front: What is the gradient of a constant scalar function, c?
What is the product rule for the gradient of the product of two scalar functions, f and g?
What is the gradient of the dot product of two vector fields, 𝐅 and 𝐆?
State the identity for the curl of a gradient (∇ × ∇f).
back: ∇ × (∇f) = 0 (for any smooth scalar field f, the curl of its gradient is always the zero vector)

front: What is the divergence of the curl of a vector field 𝐅 (∇ · (∇ × 𝐅))?
back: ∇ · (∇ × 𝐅) = 0 (for any smooth vector field 𝐅, the divergence of its curl is always zero)
